question: The line chart shows annual revenue from 1924 to 2024. Which statement best describes a limitation when interpreting this chart?

options.A: The chart is so small that it is difficult to read the exact years and values clearly.
options.C: Revenue remained constant over the entire period.
options.D: Revenue more than doubled every decade.

explanation: The chart shows a steady increase throughout. Small size can lead to misreading a segment as a decline.
